description: The `FirewallRule` DSC resource is used to create, modify, or remove Windows Firewall rules.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `FirewallRule` DSC resource is used to create, modify, or remove Windows Firewall rules.

Name.title: Name
Name.description: The unique name of the firewall rule. This is a key and mandatory property.

DisplayName.title: DisplayName
DisplayName.description: The display name of the firewall rule.

Action.title: Action
Action.description: The action for the firewall rule. Accepted values are `NotConfigured`, `Allow`, or `Block`.

Description.title: Description
Description.description: A description for the firewall rule.

Direction.title: Direction
Direction.description: The direction of the firewall rule. Accepted values are `Inbound` or `Outbound`.

Enabled.title: Enabled
Enabled.description: Specifies whether the firewall rule is enabled.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description: Specifies whether the firewall rule should be present or absent. Defaults to `Present`.

LocalPort.title: LocalPort
LocalPort.description: The local ports to which the rule applies.

Profiles.title: Profiles
Profiles.description: The network profiles to which the rule applies (e.g., `Domain`, `Private`, `Public`).

Protocol.title: Protocol
Protocol.description: The protocol for the firewall rule (e.g., `TCP`, `UDP`).

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/FirewallRule
